title: Cabbage Pancake
description: A traditional British dish made with a yeasty pancake filled with sautéed cabbage.
instructions: Heat 1 tsp of oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add 1 cup of shredded cabbage and cook until it's tender.
In a separate bowl, mix the molten yeasty british pancake batter.
Add salt and pepper to the pancake batter.
Pour the pancake batter over the cooked cabbage in the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the pancake is golden brown.
Flip the pancake and cook for another 2-3 minutes or until it's golden brown.
